summary: Turn natural language into a shell command with apfel.
description: Generate a single macOS shell command from a natural language request. Supports copy to clipboard and optional execution after confirmation.

summary: Define a word or phrase with apfel.
description: Tiny multilingual dictionary lookup with fixed structured output. Supports input and output language selection plus clipboard copy.

summary: Turn plain English into a shell one-liner with apfel.
description: Generate compact UNIX one-liners and pipe chains from a natural language request using apfel.
